resolution.summary: As with other pull requests: Please do not rebase a PR unless a reviewer asks you to rebase the PR, or GitHub reports conflicts. Every rebase will trigger unecessary CI runs and notifications to maintainers. The PR will be rebased on merge anyway, so please ignore any GitHub notifications that the branch is outdated.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
